hero.tag: New Release · Integrated with Claude Code & Hermes Agent
hero.title: OpenClaw
hero.subtitle: An AI assistant that truly works autonomously. It independently executes tasks, manages files, runs commands, and seamlessly integrates with your workflow. No technical background required, get started in 5 minutes.
hero.support: Supports Mac M-series, Intel series, Windows 10/11 (64-bit), Linux

demos.user: Help me monitor competitor prices, generate daily comparison reports and send to enterprise WeChat
demos.result: → Core category prices 12% above average, pricing recommendations generated, reports sent.

demos.user: Analyze this week's sales data, identify abnormal fluctuations and provide reasons
demos.result: → East region sales down 23% QoQ, mainly due to channel stockouts, detailed report attached.

demos.user: Statistics of this week's outpatient data, analyze consultation volume and wait time by department
demos.result: → This week 2,847 visits, orthopedics average wait 52 minutes exceeds standard, optimization recommendations attached.

demos.user: Fetch today's A-share medical sector data, analyze abnormal stocks, generate morning report
demos.result: → Medical sector today 3 limit-up stocks, 2 strategic expansion signals, competitive brief generated.

demos.user: Calculate total change order amounts, determine if contract limit exceeded
demos.result: → Cumulative changes ¥1.278 million, 15% over contract limit, warning notification sent.

models.title: Supporting {count} Major Domestic and International Model Providers

features.title: Why Choose OpenClaw?
features.subtitle: A true AI digital employee, not just a chatbot

items.title: Autonomous Task Execution
items.desc: An AI assistant that truly works independently - analyzes, invokes tools, outputs results without constant supervision.

items.title: Privacy First, Local Data
items.desc: All data stored locally, no cloud relay. Your files, conversations, and operation records are completely under your control.

items.title: Full Domestic Model Support
items.desc: Compatible with domestic LLMs like Tongyi Qianwen, Wenxin Yiyan, Kimi, DeepSeek, as well as international models like OpenAI, Claude.

items.title: Full Platform Integration
items.desc: Seamlessly connect with enterprise WeChat, Feishu, DingTalk and other office tools, bridging the last mile of your workflow.

items.title: Remote Monitoring
items.desc: Monitor computer-side OpenClaw tasks remotely via mobile assistant, get real-time updates on all activities.

items.title: Agent Auto-Evolution
items.desc: Integrated with Claude Code and Hermes Agent, supports automatic agent evolution, comprehensively upgrading intelligent capabilities.

cta.title: A truly autonomous AI assistant that makes complex work automated
cta.subtitle: Deploy OpenClaw quickly and start your digital employee era.
cta.free: Free to use · No registration required · Open source & transparent
